 {"id":"bd-31co","title":"E2E: Finalizer LIFO + masking scenario","description":"Add an E2E scenario test (likely in tests/phase0_verification.rs) that exercises region finalizers running LIFO and async finalizers executing under cancellation mask. Supports asupersync-5h0 scenario #8 (Finalizer LIFO + masking).","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"IvoryCompass","created_at":"2026-01-23T07:16:58.240028537Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-26T16:43:24.755638434Z","closed_at":"2026-01-26T16:43:24.755620701Z","close_reason":"Finalizer LIFO + masking E2E tests implemented: e2e_finalizer_lifo_async_masked_execution and e2e_finalizer_lifo_runs_after_cancel both pass","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-31co","depends_on_id":"bd-5h0","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-03T00:02:10Z","created_by":"import"}]}
 {"id":"bd-31ee8","title":"E2E sharded runtime regression suite (structured logging + traces)","description":"Goal: provide end-to-end coverage for sharded RuntimeState with deterministic, replayable logging and trace artifacts.

Scope / Scenarios (must be deterministic):
- Multi-worker runtime: spawn/wake storm with local + global queues.
- Cancellation propagation across regions with obligations held (reserve/commit/abort).
- Region close ⇒ quiescence with mixed task completion outcomes.
- Race/loser drain behavior under cancellation pressure.

Logging & Artifacts:
- Use TestContext/TestHarness to emit structured logs (no ad-hoc stdout).
- Log: seed, worker count, shard locks used, lock metrics snapshot, trace event counts, and invariants results.
- Capture a trace file or JSON artifact for replay/regression comparison.

Acceptance Criteria:
- One or more E2E tests/scripts in `tests/e2e/` (or documented equivalent) runnable via a single deterministic command.
- Logs are detailed and stable across runs; trace artifact is replayable.
- E2E failures point to specific shard/invariant via structured log fields.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-04T20:16:35.166390461Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-04T20:21:52.191358873Z","closed_at":"2026-02-04T20:21:52.191269136Z","close_reason":"Superseded by bd-ecaeo E2E Contention Harness + Structured Artifacts","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-31ee8","depends_on_id":"bd-2ijqf","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-04T20:16:35.180680995Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"bd-31kgp","title":"Fix clippy warnings blocking CI","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"FuchsiaCliff","created_at":"2026-02-04T19:09:20.610194344Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-04T19:14:04.976929123Z","closed_at":"2026-02-04T19:14:04.976804160Z","close_reason":"Fixed: assert!(false,...) -> panic!() in region.rs:1514 and clone_on_copy -> deref in runtime_e2e.rs:1923. The e2e_messaging.rs issue was fixed by CrimsonBridge. All clippy checks pass.","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
-{"id":"bd-31nlw","title":"[bd-2ijqf] RuntimeState API Migration + Callsite Audit","description":"Goal: migrate all RuntimeState callsites to the new Task/Region/Obligation table APIs and eliminate lingering full-state locks in hot paths.

Background:
- After TaskTable + Region/Obligation tables exist, any leftover RuntimeState locks will reintroduce contention and defeat the refactor.
- Multiple modules outside scheduler (e.g., io_op, runtime builder, lab runtime) access RuntimeState; these must be audited and updated.
- Cross-table refactors (bd-2utc3) must land before this audit, otherwise we will audit against stale paths.

Scope / Deliverables:
- Inventory all callsites of RuntimeState locks and categorize by hot-path vs cold-path.
- Update callsites to use TaskTable/RegionTable/ObligationTable APIs as appropriate.
- Remove or fence any remaining full-state lock usage in hot paths (no compatibility shims).
- Ensure tests and benches use the correct APIs; update helper utilities and test harnesses.

Testing & Logging:
- Add unit tests for any new helper APIs introduced during migration.
- Use lock-metrics in tests to assert hot paths do not acquire RuntimeState locks.
- Run E2E contention harness once after migration to confirm logs still emit correctly.

Acceptance Criteria:
- No hot-path code holds a full RuntimeState lock.
- All callsites compile cleanly with new table APIs; no wrapper shims.
- Migration steps documented in the bead notes for future maintenance.","acceptance_criteria":"1. No hot-path code holds a full RuntimeState lock (verified by audit list + structured test logs).
2. All callsites compile cleanly with new table APIs; no shims or compatibility wrappers.
3. New helper APIs have unit tests; migration changes are covered by lab tests where relevant.
4. E2E contention harness (bd-ecaeo) passes; add/extend an E2E script if new hot-path APIs are introduced.
5. Migration steps documented in bead notes for future maintenance.","notes":"[2026-02-06] Inventory (DarkElk): RuntimeState big-lock callsites to migrate once bd-2utc3/bd-s13um land. Hot-path (worker loop): src/runtime/scheduler/worker.rs (execute: state.lock at ~74, 201, 230, 283, 375, 386, 408, 418). Hot-path (queue ops): src/runtime/scheduler/local_queue.rs (push/pop/steal: state.lock at ~91, 99, 146, 185; plus test helpers ~272/480). Hot-path (scheduler inject/wake/spawn): src/runtime/scheduler/three_lane.rs (many state.lock in inject_cancel/timed/ready/spawn/wake, plus worker init). Spawn API path (potentially hot depending on workload): src/runtime/builder.rs (RuntimeInner::spawn: state.lock at ~1069). Cold/setup: src/runtime/builder.rs (root region + config at ~962; blocking pool handle at ~1039).

Non-scheduler RuntimeState usages that will need audit/adjustment during migration: src/cx/scope.rs (core region/spawn APIs take &mut RuntimeState), src/actor.rs (helpers take &mut RuntimeState), src/lab/runtime.rs + src/lab/oracle/* (lab owns RuntimeState), src/obligation/lyapunov.rs (snapshot extraction), src/observability/* (Arc<RuntimeState> diagnostics/inspectors).

Search recipes: rg -n 'ContendedMutex<\s*RuntimeState' src/runtime ; rg -n '\bstate\.lock\(' src/runtime ; rg -n '\bRuntimeState\b' src | rg -v '^src/runtime/'.","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"DarkElk","created_at":"2026-02-04T21:03:17.356391261Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T02:16:19.861054625Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-31nlw","depends_on_id":"bd-1pfhx","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-05T01:33:18.091599667Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-31nlw","depends_on_id":"bd-1tc1m","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-04T21:03:30.815252203Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-31nlw","depends_on_id":"bd-2018r","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-04T21:03:34.884536705Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-31nlw","depends_on_id":"bd-2utc3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-05T02:19:15.973453927Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-31nlw","depends_on_id":"bd-3xvow","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-04T21:03:35.038368330Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-31nlw","depends_on_id":"bd-s13um","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-04T21:20:07.550186952Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

Search recipes: rg -n 'ContendedMutex<\s*RuntimeState' src/runtime ; rg -n '\bstate\.lock\(' src/runtime ; rg -n '\bRuntimeState\b' src | rg -v '^src/runtime/'.","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"DarkElk","created_at":"2026-02-04T21:03:17.356391261Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T02:18:59.217331156Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-31nlw","depends_on_id":"bd-1pfhx","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-05T01:33:18.091599667Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-31nlw","depends_on_id":"bd-1tc1m","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-04T21:03:30.815252203Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-31nlw","depends_on_id":"bd-2018r","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-04T21:03:34.884536705Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-31nlw","depends_on_id":"bd-2utc3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-05T02:19:15.973453927Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-31nlw","depends_on_id":"bd-3xvow","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-04T21:03:35.038368330Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-31nlw","depends_on_id":"bd-s13um","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-04T21:20:07.550186952Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":262,"issue_id":"bd-31nlw","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Extra inventory data point (ChartreuseCove):

Big-lock callsites summary:
- Total state.lock() occurrences under src/runtime/: 54
- Breakdown:
  - src/runtime/scheduler/three_lane.rs: 36
  - src/runtime/scheduler/worker.rs: 8
  - src/runtime/scheduler/local_queue.rs: 6
  - src/runtime/builder.rs: 4

Structural callsites of Arc<ContendedMutex<RuntimeState>>:
- src/runtime/builder.rs:942
- src/runtime/scheduler/worker.rs:35
- src/runtime/scheduler/local_queue.rs:29
- src/runtime/scheduler/three_lane.rs:295 and 782

Non-src/runtime/ RuntimeState touchpoints to keep in mind for migration / API reshaping:
- src/cx/scope.rs takes &mut RuntimeState for spawn/region APIs
- src/actor.rs helper fns take &mut RuntimeState
- src/lab/runtime.rs owns a RuntimeState (lab path)
- src/observability/* holds Arc<RuntimeState> (diagnostics)
- src/obligation/lyapunov.rs snapshot extraction from &RuntimeState

ShardedState / ShardGuard infra is concentrated in src/runtime/sharded_state.rs (mapping table + guard constructors).

 {"id":"bd-32n6","title":"[ALIEN][E2E][HOMO] End-to-end: topology-guided exploration run + coverage report","description":"## Goal

End-to-end validation that persistent-homology scoring (topological novelty) improves schedule exploration *as a user experiences it*:
- explorer runs deterministically
- prioritization is explainable (evidence ledger)
- we get better bug-finding / coverage per explored node than baseline ordering

This harness complements unit tests for complexes/persistence; it validates the whole pipeline.

## Inputs

- A fixed corpus of deterministic lab scenarios (same as / compatible with bd-1ny4)
- ExplorerConfig knobs:
  - baseline: FIFO / existing ordering
  - topo: PH-guided ordering

## Required outputs (deterministic artifacts)

- A report per scenario and aggregate summary (JSON preferred) including:
  - explored nodes until first violation (if any)
  - equivalence-class count discovered
  - novelty score distribution over time
  - top-k "most novel" nodes with ledger snippets
  - runtime overhead attribution (time spent scoring vs executing)

## Logging constraints

- No stdout/stderr from core runtime code.
- Use trace events (Cx::trace) for internal scoring decisions; the harness may print a summary.

## Acceptance criteria

- Deterministic: identical outputs across repeated runs (same seed/config).
- Demonstrates a measurable improvement on at least one scenario (fewer nodes to failure OR higher coverage at same budget).
- Includes failure-mode reporting when scoring is disabled/falls back (e.g., analysis too expensive).","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-03T02:18:03.025357317Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-03T06:05:00.846357566Z","closed_at":"2026-02-03T06:05:00.846292956Z","close_reason":"Added deterministic topology E2E coverage-report test in tests/topology_benchmark.rs","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["alien","e2e","lab","testing","topology","trace"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-32n6","depends_on_id":"bd-115y","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-03T02:18:16Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-32n6","depends_on_id":"bd-1ny4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-03T02:18:16Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-32n6","depends_on_id":"bd-3490","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-03T02:18:16Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-32n6","depends_on_id":"bd-3oqu","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-03T02:18:16Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-32n6","depends_on_id":"bd-453l","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-03T02:18:16Z","created_by":"import"}]}
